turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi there! I'm calling because I need the office address and to find out where I can park.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Of course, I'd be happy to help. Could you let me know which medical office you're trying to reach so I can provide the correct address and parking information?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi! Can you tell me which medical office you're calling about, so I can give you the right address and parking details?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I'm here to help with general clinic support, but I don't have details about specific medical offices or parking.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yes,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: If you need the clinic's address, I can provide that.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like the address for this location?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yes, please, that would be great. I just need the address and where I can park when I get there.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Great,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I can give you the full clinic address.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I'm not able to provide parking or navigation details, but here's the address.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please note, I don't have the specific address on file.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I understand.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: If you need the address for a particular clinic, let me know the clinic name or any details you have.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: and I'll do my best to help.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Could you tell me the name of the clinic or provider you're visiting?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I’m actually not sure of the exact name, but it's the general family practice on Maple Avenue. I need that address and to know where I can park nearby.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I can provide the full address for the family practice on Maple Avenue, however I'm not able to give parking or navigation details.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to show the others now?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yes, please show me the address for the family practice on Maple Avenue. That’ll help a lot.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I'm sorry, but...

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I don't have the specific address for the family practice on Maple Avenue.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: If you have any more details, like the provider's name or suite number, I can try to help further.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: For parking information, I recommend checking with the clinic directly when you arrive.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I understand. I’ll call back later when I have more details. Thanks for your time. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: You too. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Take care and have a great day.
